title: Pet Your Cobblemon
description: This Cobblemon Sidemod lets you pet your Pokémon
body:
If you ever played Cobblemon and thought you wanted to interact with your Pokémon, this is the mod for you. Right-click your Pokémon three times to pet them ![Petting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lAyCdN8C/images/35678497d9ac9e4566445b7678cb3e43a2aff2dd.gif) ![](https://s13.gifyu.com/images/SPtMn.gif) More Info
Spoiler

1.3.0:
Use /interactionmode or press the assigned Keybind (Default; G) to toggle Interaction Mode
Right click your Pokémon with your hand empty 3 times while Interaction Mode is ON to pet them
this version is for a Cobblemon Snapshot which isn't on Curseforge yet

1.2.0:
Sneak + Assigned Keybind (Default; Left Click) with your hand empty while looking at your Pokémon to pet them

1.1.0 - 1.1.1:
Press the assigned Keybind (Default; G) to toggle interaction mode
Right click your Pokémon with your hand empty 5 times while Interaction Mode is ON to pet them
Right click your Pokémon while holding an Apple to feed it to them

1.0.0:
Right Click your Pokémon with your hand empty to pet them

FaQ
Spoiler

Q: Do i need this both on server and client?
A: Yes you need it on both client and server

Q: Does petting increase friendship?
A: No and i currently there's no plans for that (Anymore) i just want this mod to be cosmetic

Q: is/will there be a fabric Version
A: No and i currently there's no plans for it
